name: T3-WF-5 poll feed
description: A workflow whose inputs are delivered from a poll item by name (D17: the poll item schema is derived from these declared inputs). Used with a poll trigger against a scenario-local stub feed. Version-pinned tier-3 fixture (specs/developing/testing/scenarios.md#T3-WF-5).

steps.label: Process the polled item
steps.name: processed
steps.prompt: Process the polled item {{inputs.item_id}} titled "{{inputs.title}}". Report done=true once handled.
